data.en: What club do you want to join?
data.hint: want to do sth. 想要做某事

data.en: I want to join the art club.
data.hint: art 以元音音素开头，前用 the 发音为 /ði/

data.en: Can you play ping-pong?
data.hint: can 引导的一般疑问句

data.en: Yes, I can.
data.hint: can 疑问句的肯定回答

data.en: Sam wants to join the chess club.
data.cn: 萨姆想要加入国际象棋俱乐部。
data.hint: 第三人称单数 wants

data.en: Can you play Chinese chess?
data.hint: play + 球类/棋类（不加 the）

data.en: No, I can't.
data.hint: can 疑问句的否定回答

data.en: You can learn it here.
data.hint: 情态动词 can 后接动词原形

data.en: Can I learn to play weiqi too?
data.hint: learn to do sth. 学习做某事

data.en: Sure, you can!
data.hint: Sure 表示肯定和许可

data.en: Here's some good news!
data.hint: news 是不可数名词

data.en: Our school wants to start a music club.
data.cn: 我们学校想要创办一个音乐俱乐部。
data.hint: school 作主语，谓语用 wants

data.en: Do you want to join?
data.hint: 助动词 do 引导疑问句

data.en: Sure, I can play the guitar.
data.hint: 弹奏乐器 play 后要加 static article 'the'

data.en: I'd love to, but I can't play any musical instruments.
data.cn: 我很想，但我不会演奏任何乐器。
data.hint: I'd love to = I would love to；否定句用 any

data.en: Oh, but you can sing well.
data.hint: 副词 well 修饰动词 sing

data.en: How about Ella?
data.hint: How about...? 征求意见或询问情况

data.en: She can play the violin, right?
data.hint: 乐器前加 the

data.en: Yes, she can.
data.hint: 一般疑问句的简略回答

data.en: Let's go to the music room after school!
data.cn: 放学后我们去音乐教室吧！
data.hint: after school 放学后（固定搭配，不加冠词）
accept: After school let's go to the music room!

data.en: Can he play the violin?
data.hint: 情态动词 can 提到句首

data.en: Yes, he can.
data.hint: he can 肯定回答

data.en: Can they play chess?
data.hint: play chess 下棋

data.en: No, they can't.
data.hint: they can't 否定回答

data.en: I can run fast, but I can't swim.
data.cn: 我能跑得很快，但我不会游泳。
data.hint: but 表示前后句意转折
accept: I can't swim, but I can run fast.

data.en: Emma can sing well, but she can't play any musical instruments.
data.cn: 埃玛唱歌很好，但她不会弹奏任何乐器。
data.hint: play + musical instruments

data.en: A parrot can speak.
data.hint: speak 表示“说话，说某种语言”的能力

data.en: A cat can climb trees.
data.hint: climb trees 爬树（trees用复数）

data.en: My best friend is Linda.
data.hint: best friend 最好的朋友

data.en: Everyone in our class likes her.
data.cn: 我们班的每个人都喜欢她。
data.hint: Everyone 是单数第三人称，动词用 likes

data.en: I'm good at telling stories.
data.hint: be good at + doing sth. 擅长做某事

data.en: I often act out stories with my brother at home.
data.cn: 我经常和弟弟在家里表演故事。
data.hint: act out 表演；at home 在家
accept: At home I often act out stories with my brother.

data.en: I'm interested in nature.
data.hint: be interested in 对……感兴趣

data.en: I love hiking, and I can read maps.
data.cn: 我喜欢徒步旅行，而且我能看懂地图。
data.hint: read maps 看懂地图/读图
accept: I can read maps, and I love hiking.

data.en: I can't cook, but I love great food.
data.cn: 我不会做饭，但我喜欢美食。
data.hint: but 表示转折
accept: I love great food, but I can't cook.

data.en: I want to cook for my family.
data.hint: cook for sb. 为某人做饭

data.en: Join us in Room 303 at 4:30 p.m. on Wednesdays.
data.cn: 周三下午4点半在303室加入我们吧。
data.hint: on + 星期复数形式表示“每个星期几”

data.en: Books can open your mind and make you think.
data.cn: 书可以开阔你的眼界，让你思考。
data.hint: make sb. do sth. 让某人做某事

data.en: Fall in love with books!
data.hint: fall in love with 爱上……

data.en: Discover wildlife right under your nose!
data.cn: 发现就在你眼皮底下的野生生物！
data.hint: right under one's nose 就在某人眼皮底下

data.en: I'm really interested in your club.
data.cn: 我对你们的俱乐部真的很感兴趣。
data.hint: really 副词修饰形容词 interested

data.en: I love reading all kinds of books.
data.cn: 我喜欢阅读各种各样的书。
data.hint: all kinds of 各种各样的

data.en: Can I join your club?
data.cn: 我能加入你们的俱乐部吗？
data.hint: can 引导表示请求的疑问句

data.en: We are looking for new members.
data.hint: look for 寻找；be doing 进行时

data.en: Work as a team to design a poster.
data.hint: work as... 作为……工作/合作

data.en: Alice's drama teacher is very nice.
data.cn: 爱丽丝的戏剧老师非常好。
data.hint: 所有格 Alice's

data.en: We always have a good time!
data.hint: have a good time 玩得开心

data.en: After practice, we often have pizza.
data.cn: 练习之后，我们经常吃比萨。
data.hint: pizza 为不可数名词
accept: We often have pizza after practice.

data.en: Now I'm brave enough to talk.
data.cn: 现在我足够勇敢可以说话了。
data.hint: adj. + enough to do sth. 足够……做某事
accept: I'm brave enough to talk now.

data.en: I love my drama club because it's never boring.
data.cn: 我爱我的戏剧俱乐部，因为它从不乏味。
data.hint: because 引导原因状语从句
accept: Because it's never boring, I love my drama club.
